tutrain.value_prop_one_liner: White-label live remote tutoring infrastructure for EdTech platforms
tutrain.what_we_offer: Expert live remote tutors delivered as a service — branded as the customer's product, scalable on-demand, no in-house hiring or management required
positive_signals: Recent product launch or platform pivot
Mentions human support gaps or scalability challenges
Posts about engagement or learning outcome metrics
negative_signals: Already operates their own tutor network at scale
Pure B2C parent-facing brand with no platform
Series B or later (likely has in-house team)

outreach_angle.pain_hypothesis: Early-stage EdTech founders often promise live human support but can't economically staff or scale it — engineering team is small, tutoring is operational debt
outreach_angle.value_framing: Plug-and-play white-label tutoring tier. You keep the brand, the data, and the margin. We deliver vetted tutors on-demand.
outreach_angle.primary_cta: 15-min walkthrough of how we white-label for similar-stage platforms
outreach_angle.fallback_cta: Free 5-tutor pilot for 2 weeks, no commitment

eqourse_content.value_prop_one_liner: Custom US-standards-mapped digital curriculum, test-prep question banks, and structured learning content for EdTech platforms
eqourse_content.what_we_offer: Pre-built and custom US-standards-mapped curriculum, test-prep question banks, and structured learning content — delivered as a service so platforms ship content with their product instead of building it in-house
positive_signals: Recent product launch or platform pivot
Mentions human support gaps or scalability challenges
Posts about engagement or learning outcome metrics
Hiring content writers or curriculum designers
Mentions content gap or roadmap delay
Has product but limited content library
negative_signals: Already operates their own tutor network at scale
Pure B2C parent-facing brand with no platform
Series B or later (likely has in-house team)

outreach_angle.pain_hypothesis: Seed-stage EdTech with engineering team but no curriculum staff. Building content in-house takes 6-12 months and pulls focus from product.
outreach_angle.value_framing: Pre-built or custom-built US-standards curriculum, test banks, and learning data. Ship content with your platform, not after.
outreach_angle.primary_cta: 15-min look at a sample of curriculum we've built for similar platforms
outreach_angle.fallback_cta: Free 50-question pilot bank in your subject area

eqourse_ai_data.value_prop_one_liner: High-quality data annotation, RLHF feedback collection, and model evaluation services for AI/ML companies, delivered by expert human annotators
eqourse_ai_data.what_we_offer: Domain-expert annotators for LLM RLHF, evaluation datasets, voice/speech labeling, computer vision tagging, and custom red-teaming. Education-domain experts in-house.
positive_signals: Open job posts mention data quality, evaluation, or annotation
Building LLM, voice AI, or computer vision product

outreach_angle.pain_hypothesis: Series A AI startup just raised and is scaling model training. Their evaluation and RLHF pipelines need rapid expert labeling at quality their automated pipeline can't deliver.
outreach_angle.value_framing: Domain-expert annotators (education, language, STEM) at SLA quality. Faster than building in-house, more accurate than crowd platforms.
outreach_angle.primary_cta: 15-min review of our annotation quality and turnaround vs your current approach
outreach_angle.fallback_cta: Free 500-row pilot annotation in your most painful labeling category
